programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Detective Dorothy, Psychic Healer, Star Prophecy
programme.desc: In the 1970s, paranormal detective, Dorothy Allison, helps the police in the US; in the 2010s, John of God calls himself a healer; in ancient times, the commander, Josephus, makes predictions.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: Silent movie trivia really isn't in Justin and Mike's wheelhouse but they can't resist Buster Keaton's legacy in Cottage Grove, Ore.; they get an unexpected dose of "Gold Fever," which forces Toban to seek out precious metals and equine expertise.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A therapy for a medical condition makes her heart stop, the experience takes her into another world filled with numbers and equations; a woman's travels in the Amazon lead to her death and experience of an afterlife that blurs with her surroundings.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: In 1943, a facility nestled in the Norwegian hills could provide Nazis with a piece to their nuclear puzzle; with the threat of nuclear weapons looming, the Allies carry out the most successful act of sabotage in World War II.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were an attempt by a Jewish-Christian alliance to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a Special Assignment research team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Korea: A Forever Sense of Self
programme.desc: Kaelyn knows little of her Korean heritage; her grandfather, Hae Suk, moved to Canada as a young man and hasn't shared much of his difficult past with his family.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Detective Dorothy, Psychic Healer, Star Prophecy
programme.desc: In the 1970s, paranormal detective, Dorothy Allison, helps the police in the US; in the 2010s, John of God calls himself a healer; in ancient times, the commander, Josephus, makes predictions.

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The United States, United Kingdom and the Soviet Union race to create the first super-weapon; New York City becomes a hotbed of spy games; soviet spies weave intricate legends so they can work deep undercover.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Against Nature (Tim Samaras, David A. Johnston, George Mallory)
programme.desc: Nature is powerful and can snuff out life in an instant, but for three intrepid adventurers, nature holds mysteries just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A therapy for a medical condition makes her heart stop, the experience takes her into another world filled with numbers and equations; a woman's travels in the Amazon lead to her death and experience of an afterlife that blurs with her surroundings.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: In 1943, a facility nestled in the Norwegian hills could provide Nazis with a piece to their nuclear puzzle; with the threat of nuclear weapons looming, the Allies carry out the most successful act of sabotage in World War II.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: Silent movie trivia really isn't in Justin and Mike's wheelhouse but they can't resist Buster Keaton's legacy in Cottage Grove, Ore.; they get an unexpected dose of "Gold Fever," which forces Toban to seek out precious metals and equine expertise.

programme.title: Oracles & Prophets
programme.sub-title: Detective Dorothy, Psychic Healer, Star Prophecy
programme.desc: In the 1970s, paranormal detective, Dorothy Allison, helps the police in the US; in the 2010s, John of God calls himself a healer; in ancient times, the commander, Josephus, makes predictions.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were an attempt by a Jewish-Christian alliance to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a Special Assignment research team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The United States, United Kingdom and the Soviet Union race to create the first super-weapon; New York City becomes a hotbed of spy games; soviet spies weave intricate legends so they can work deep undercover.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: Convinced the medieval witch trials were an attempt by a Jewish-Christian alliance to exterminate the Aryans, Himmler established a Special Assignment research team led by Reinhard Heydrich to build a database of medieval German witchcraft practices.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.sub-title: Korea: A Forever Sense of Self
programme.desc: Kaelyn knows little of her Korean heritage; her grandfather, Hae Suk, moved to Canada as a young man and hasn't shared much of his difficult past with his family.

programme.title: Fishing for History
programme.desc: Silent movie trivia really isn't in Justin and Mike's wheelhouse but they can't resist Buster Keaton's legacy in Cottage Grove, Ore.; they get an unexpected dose of "Gold Fever," which forces Toban to seek out precious metals and equine expertise.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Against Nature (Tim Samaras, David A. Johnston, George Mallory)
programme.desc: Nature is powerful and can snuff out life in an instant, but for three intrepid adventurers, nature holds mysteries just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: I Died... And Came Back
programme.desc: A therapy for a medical condition makes her heart stop, the experience takes her into another world filled with numbers and equations; a woman's travels in the Amazon lead to her death and experience of an afterlife that blurs with her surroundings.

programme.title: Forgotten Frontlines
programme.desc: In 1943, a facility nestled in the Norwegian hills could provide Nazis with a piece to their nuclear puzzle; with the threat of nuclear weapons looming, the Allies carry out the most successful act of sabotage in World War II.

programme.title: Nintendo 64 Quest
programme.sub-title: Because You Have More Than One Friend
programme.desc: Jay visits A & C Games in Toronto and finds unbelievable video game gold.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Hinduism is a pluralistic and syncretic belief system that features thousands of divinities that are all aspects of a singular divine; exploring how Hinduism's embrace of diversity and spirituality continues to shape India and the world.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Shaun travels back to Zimbabwe to face the land he loves and the political climate that forced him to leave; his daughter Shannon begins to embrace her personal identity as a biracial woman.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Georgia's mother parted from her parents in Greece on bad terms at only sixteen years old. Now, Georgia is desperate to connect with her Greek heritage and to have a better relationship with her own mother.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Ancient shipwrecks sunken off the coast of America's Goat Island lead researchers to one vessel from the age of exploration.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Hinduism is a pluralistic and syncretic belief system that features thousands of divinities that are all aspects of a singular divine; exploring how Hinduism's embrace of diversity and spirituality continues to shape India and the world.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Georgia's mother parted from her parents in Greece on bad terms at only sixteen years old. Now, Georgia is desperate to connect with her Greek heritage and to have a better relationship with her own mother.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Ancient shipwrecks sunken off the coast of America's Goat Island lead researchers to one vessel from the age of exploration.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Ancient Dead
programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.desc: Hinduism is a pluralistic and syncretic belief system that features thousands of divinities that are all aspects of a singular divine; exploring how Hinduism's embrace of diversity and spirituality continues to shape India and the world.

programme.desc: Ancient shipwrecks sunken off the coast of America's Goat Island lead researchers to one vessel from the age of exploration.

programme.desc: To ensure body and spirit remain everlasting, the ancient Egyptians developed elaborate rituals, massive tombs, and even magic incantations to entomb their remains; when laying bodies to rest, the Romans were all about processional pomp and grandeur.

programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: Washington state holds the nation's highest rates of UFO sightings per-capita, with a new report made every 55 hours; why do UFOs choose to hover there?

programme.title: Ghosts Off Grid
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist in Austin, Texas connects Jordyn and Johnny with spirits inhabiting a century-old building. The present-day Indian restaurant and banquet hall holds many secrets within its walls and sealed-off tunnels.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Ancient shipwrecks sunken off the coast of America's Goat Island lead researchers to one vessel from the age of exploration.

programme.title: Believe
programme.desc: Hinduism is a pluralistic and syncretic belief system that features thousands of divinities that are all aspects of a singular divine; exploring how Hinduism's embrace of diversity and spirituality continues to shape India and the world.

programme.title: Revolutions That Changed History
programme.desc: In the wake of the Black Death a labour shortage gives the underclass leverage to demand better wages, but England's involvement in the Hundred Year War has left the treasury empty and Britain's Baron's are sick of paying for it all.

programme.title: How I Got Here
programme.desc: Shaun travels back to Zimbabwe to face the land he loves and the political climate that forced him to leave; his daughter Shannon begins to embrace her personal identity as a biracial woman.

programme.title: Deadly Science
programme.sub-title: Against Nature (Tim Samaras, David A. Johnston, George Mallory)
programme.desc: Nature is powerful and can snuff out life in an instant, but for three intrepid adventurers, nature holds mysteries just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.title: UFO: POV
programme.desc: Renowned UFO expert Chris Rutkowski investigates real unexplained encounters, combining eyewitness testimony, on-the-ground investigation, and decades of research to uncover what really happened.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: In a Danish bog, hundreds of mutilated ancient bones are found, while a mysterious deserted island belonging to Russia is explored.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ancient Bodies: Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Two bodies are discovered near the town of Weerdinger, Netherlands; locals jump to conclusions that the two bodies belong to a man and woman united in life and death.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: An earthquake in 2018 seems to have led an increase in UFO sightings in Alaska; do the extraterrestrials have something to protect here?

programme.title: A Cold War of Spies
programme.desc: The desire to spy behind enemy lines leads to the development of some of the world's most sophisticated reconnaissance technologies; the United States finds a way into Soviet airspace through overflights of their top-secret stealth plane, the U-2.

programme.sub-title: Against Nature (Tim Samaras, David A. Johnston, George Mallory)
